name: Max Twist
short_description: Ride the future of extreme sports in the VR hoverboard racer, Max Twist! Step onto your board and tear through neon-lit, gravity-bending tracks packed with obstacles, boosts, and insane twists. Chase high scores, smash time records, and master your own seamless style to a heart-pounding soundtrack.
detailed_description:
✦ Max Twist ✦

A VR hoverboard racer built for speed, style, and score-attack runs.

Ride the future of extreme sports in VR. Strap onto your hoverboard and dive through neon-lit, sci-fi tracks packed with obstacles, boosts, and gravity-defying twists. Chase speed scores, smash time records, and push for the perfect run to an adrenaline-pumping soundtrack. Inspired by games like 1080° Snowboarding, F-Zero, and SSX, Max Twist reimagines high-speed and stylish racing for the space age.

Choose between the Casual Circuit for a relaxed ride or the Pro Circuit for razor-sharp competition against your best times and friends’ scores. Every course is built to test your reflexes; stay fast, keep twisting, and prove you're the best on a board in your own unique style!

Features

  • 27 total tracks: 18 official courses plus 9 brand-new slalom runs

  • Over 40 music tracks to fuel your ride with nonstop energy

  • Broad headset support: HTC Vive, HTC Cosmos, Meta Quest (via Link/Air Link), Quest 2, Quest 3, HTC Cosmos, Oculus Rift, and most SteamVR-compatible headsets

  • Tutorial track & in-game guide to get you started fast and serve as a reference guide

  • Sci-fi spaceship hub for course and soundtrack selection

  • VR touch-based menus designed for immersion and ease of use

  • Latest update: additional music tracks, improved sound effects, upgraded graphics, and sharper immersion

supported_languages:
English*, Simplified Chinese, Russian, Japanese, Korean
*languages with full audio support
